name: The Lounge
description: Modern web IRC client designed for self-hosting
compose:
name: slashnode-thelounge
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/thelounge/thelounge:v4.4.3
    container_name: thelounge
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data:/var/opt/thelounge
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9003:9000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-thelounge_web_data
